events.text: Your car won't start on a rainy morning. The mechanic says the alternator needs replacing.

choices.label: Pay for the full repair
choices.resultText: The car runs smoothly again. Expensive but necessary.

choices.label: Patch it up cheaply
choices.resultText: It limps along for now. You worry about the next breakdown.

events.text: Heavy rains expose a leak in your roof. Water drips into the sitting room.

choices.label: Hire a proper roofer
choices.resultText: The roof is sealed. You sleep dry tonight.

choices.label: Place buckets and wait
choices.resultText: Mould starts forming. The problem grows worse.

events.text: A distant relative leaves you a modest inheritance. The lawyer calls with good news.

choices.label: Accept gratefully
choices.resultText: The funds clear. You whisper a prayer of thanks.

choices.label: Donate part to charity
choices.resultText: You kept some and gave back. It feels right.

events.text: You return from work to find your gate open and some belongings missing.

choices.label: Report to police
choices.resultText: Paperwork and patience. Little is recovered.

choices.label: Accept the loss and move on
choices.resultText: You replace what you can and double-check the locks.

events.text: A friend swears they have a hot tip on a local savings group — pay in easily with {moneyApp}. They want you in.

choices.label: Invest a solid amount
choices.resultText: The group paid out modestly. A pleasant surprise.

choices.label: Invest cautiously
choices.resultText: Small gain, small risk. Not bad.

choices.label: Decline politely
choices.resultText: You heard later it went sideways. Bullet dodged.

events.text: A family member calls asking to borrow money for school fees. They want it sent through {moneyApp} and sound desperate.

choices.label: Lend them generously
choices.resultText: They thank you profusely. Family comes first.

choices.label: Offer half the amount
choices.resultText: They accept, a little disappointed but grateful.

choices.label: Refuse — you need the money
choices.resultText: An awkward silence on the phone. They understand, maybe.

events.text: Your boda's chain snaps on a dusty road. A fundi nearby offers a quick fix.

choices.label: Pay for a full service
choices.resultText: The bike purrs again. Worth every shilling.

choices.label: Just fix the chain
choices.resultText: It works for now. Other parts look worn.

events.text: Your scooter's chain snaps on a quiet road. A mechanic nearby offers a quick fix.

choices.label: Pay for a full service
choices.resultText: The scooter purrs again. Worth every coin.

choices.label: Just fix the chain
choices.resultText: It works for now. Other parts look worn.

events.text: Property prices in your area climb steadily. Neighbours talk about selling at a tidy profit.

choices.label: Ride the wave and hold
choices.resultText: Your home's paper value rises. You feel a little richer on paper.

choices.label: Stay cautious
choices.resultText: You keep a level head while others celebrate.

events.text: Headlines warn of a slowdown. Shops quiet down and landlords whisper about lower rents.

choices.label: Tighten spending
choices.resultText: You cut extras and wait for calmer days.

choices.label: Carry on as usual
choices.resultText: The downturn still nipped at your wallet.

events.text: A letter arrives about taxes on a small inheritance you received years ago. The amount due is higher than expected.

choices.label: Pay in full promptly
choices.resultText: The matter closes cleanly. Your books are square again.

choices.label: Negotiate a payment plan
choices.resultText: You spread the cost over months. Manageable, if annoying.

events.text: Investors flood your neighbourhood with offers well above asking price. Your street feels like a gold rush.

choices.label: Decline every offer
choices.resultText: You chose roots over profit — but your asset values still rose.

choices.label: Sell a secondary plot if you had one
choices.resultText: You cashed in on the frenzy and banked a windfall.

events.text: A burst pipe floods your home overnight. Water soaks the floors and the walls smell of mildew.

choices.label: Pay for emergency repairs
choices.resultText: Plumbers work through the night. The damage is contained before it spreads.

choices.label: Ignore it and hope it dries out
choices.resultText: Mould spreads. The property is essentially ruined.

events.text: Your car engine sputters on the highway and white smoke pours from the bonnet. Traffic honks behind you.

choices.label: Pay for emergency repairs
choices.resultText: The mechanic rebuilds the engine block. Expensive, but you are mobile again.

choices.label: Abandon the car on the roadside
choices.resultText: The car is towed for scrap. You watch it leave on a flatbed.

events.text: Your boda's engine seizes mid-ride with a loud clunk. You push it to the nearest fundi in the blazing sun.

choices.label: Pay for a full engine rebuild
choices.resultText: The fundi works miracles. The bike roars back to life.

choices.label: Walk away and leave it
choices.resultText: Rust takes over. The bike never runs again.

events.text: While clearing out the attic, you find a dusty wooden box wrapped in cloth — inside rests an old pocket watch that still ticks faintly.

choices.label: Keep it in the family
choices.resultText: The watch becomes a treasured family heirloom.

choices.label: Sell it to a collector
choices.resultText: A dealer pays well, but the watch leaves your family forever.

events.text: At a chaotic estate auction, a bidding war erupts over a velvet pouch. You accidentally win with a wave of your paddle.

choices.label: Pay up and claim the gem
choices.resultText: Inside the pouch: a rare gemstone that catches every light.

choices.label: Forfeit the bid
choices.resultText: The auctioneer glares, but you walk away poorer in pride only.

events.text: A relative passes down a brittle leather folio — pages of an ancient manuscript in a language almost forgotten.

choices.label: Preserve it carefully
choices.resultText: Scholars would envy you. The manuscript stays in your care.

choices.label: Donate it to a museum
choices.resultText: Your name is etched on a small plaque at the entrance.

events.text: Your employees walk out over pay and hours. Pickets form outside the office.

choices.label: Negotiate a raise package
choices.resultText: Costly, but operations resume and morale recovers.

choices.label: Hold the line and wait them out
choices.resultText: The strike drags on. Customers leave and revenue tanks.

events.text: A well-funded rival launches in your industry with aggressive pricing.

choices.label: Invest in a marketing blitz
choices.resultText: You held market share. Valuation ticks up.

choices.label: Ignore them and stay the course
choices.resultText: They steal clients. Your books look thinner.

events.text: A venture capital firm offers a partial buyout — cash now, less control later.

choices.label: Accept the investment
choices.resultText: Cash hits your account. The board just got more crowded.

choices.label: Keep full ownership
choices.resultText: You stay independent. Growth stays on your terms.

events.text: A key supplier fails. Inventory is thin and customers are calling.

choices.label: Pay premium for emergency stock
choices.resultText: Expensive, but shelves stay full.

choices.label: Delay orders and apologize
choices.resultText: Refunds pile up. Trust takes a hit.

events.text: One of your offerings goes viral overnight. Orders flood in faster than you can fulfill.

choices.label: Hire fast and scale up
choices.resultText: Chaos, then growth. Your valuation soars.

choices.label: Cap orders to protect quality
choices.resultText: Steady gains without burning out the team.

events.text: Tax authorities open an audit on your company books. Penalties could be steep.

choices.label: Hire a specialist accountant
choices.resultText: Fees hurt, but you clear the audit cleanly.

choices.label: Handle it yourself
choices.resultText: Mistakes cost more than the specialist would have.

events.text: A franchise group wants to license your brand in other cities for an upfront fee.

choices.label: License the brand
choices.resultText: Your name spreads. Royalty checks will follow.

choices.label: Protect exclusivity
choices.resultText: You keep the brand rare — and local.
